question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between Dallas Mavericks and Portland Trail Blazers on 2026-03-27?
question.context: Dallas Mavericks (23-50) at Portland Trail Blazers (37-37). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: The NBA consistently features high-scoring games, with average totals often around 230 points. The Portland Trail Blazers, playing at home with a .500 record, will be motivated and are expected to perform well offensively against the struggling Dallas Mavericks (23-50). While Dallas has a poor record, they are still an NBA team capable of scoring in the 105-115 range. This matchup suggests Portland will score above their average (e.g., 118-125 points), and Dallas will contribute a respectable total, leading to an overall score slightly above the league average, given the context of one team being significantly weaker.
